title: Anboor Hamburger Squishy Toy, Ultra Soft Silicone Realistic Burger Food Squeeze Fidget Toys Stress Relief for Kids Adults Autism Birthday Gifts
features: 【Ultra-Soft Silicone for a Premium Squish】 – Crafted with Hamburger silicone for a luxuriously soft touch and exquisite detail — an adorable, high-end squishy Hamburger that's as delightful to hold as it is to look at. Unlike common TPR on the market, silicone's smooth, non-sticky surface ensures a clean, satisfying squeeze without residue. The playful design sparks conversations and brings joy to kawaii lovers and anyone craving a tactile escape from stress.

【Safe & Durable for All Ages】– Made from food-grade silicone, this Hamburger Squeeze toy are free from BPA, phthalates, and harmful chemicals, making them safe for kids, teens, and adults. Offering an ultra-soft squish toys texture that mimics the "mushy" feel, through endless squeezing, stretching, and reshaping.

【Portable & Discreet Stress Relief】 – Lightweight and pocket-sized, the Hamburger Bread squishy Toy fit easily in bags, desks, or travel kits.Play during meetings, study sessions, or flights —no noise or mess.

【Calming Sensory】–The silicone's smooth, elastic texture provides gentle resistance when squeezed, promoting calmness and focus. The Hamburger-inspired design adds whimsical charm, turning everyday moments into joyful interactions. Whether you need anxiety relief or a fun distraction, the squishy toy deliver a sensory experience that's both therapeutic and visually appealing.

【Gifts & Party Favor】 – Perfect as handmade squishy Toy for birthdays, party favors, or office giveaways, the Hamburger stress toy are loved by children, teens, and adults alike. Not edible! Keep out of reach of children under 3 years old.
description: Product Description Anboor Hamburger Squishy Toy Anboor is a professional manufacturer specializing in the design, development and production of cute squishy. We understand the importance of providing our customers with fun, safe and durable toys. That's why we use only the best materials and production methods to make our squishy toys. With a commitment to creating high-quality and innovative products, it has become a well-known brand in the toy industry. With the features of sweet fragrances and soft tactile touch, Anboor Squishy includes a variety of squishy toys in different shapes, sizes and colours loved by children and adults. They are kawaii and slow rising and can relieve stress by squeezing. Anboor squishy are also great educational tools to inspire children's imagination and creativity. Anboor is committed to providing customers with the best possible experience and has a strict quality control process to ensure that each product meets our high standards. Your 100% satisfactory shopping experience is our main goal. If you are looking for a stress relieving toy, sensory play tool or cute collection that is both fun and functional, Anboor has something for everyone. Hamburger Squishy Toy Hamburger squishy are the perfect addition to role play! These cute and soft toys are suitable as fun and safe "delicious hamburgers" in the game world, encouraging creativity and narrative skills. Perfect for hide-and-seek games, role play and even for training fine motor skills - they are imaginative companions for children. With them, children can improve their practical skills, patience and social skills in family games - and have lots of Kawaii fun! Say goodbye to loud and annoying stress relief toys and look forward to the soothing experience of our innovative slow rising squishies toy. Gently squeeze, knead freely and play as you like - This ultra-soft toy effectively helps relieve anxiety, clear your head and improve concentration. It is perfect for fun with the whole family The squishies are very soft and can be shaped into any desired shape.
